name: video-template-ancient-guardian-dragon-rescue
title: Ancient Guardian Dragon Rescue

title_i18n.vi: Giải Cứu Rồng Thủ Hộ Cổ Đại
title_i18n.nl: Redding door de Oude Beschermende Draak

description: A detailed multi-shot cinematic prompt for a story about a girl in a rainy village saved by an emerging dragon, focusing on VFX and atmospheric sound.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 一个详细的多镜头电影级提示词，讲述雨中村庄少女被巨龙拯救的故事，专注于视觉特效和氛围音效。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 詳細的多鏡頭電影級提示詞，講述雨中村莊少女被巨龍拯救的故事，專注於視覺特效和氛圍音效。
description_i18n.ja: 雨の村で少女が現れた竜に救われる物語の詳細なマルチショット映画プロンプト。VFXと雰囲気のあるサウンドに焦点を当てています。
description_i18n.ko: 비 오는 마을에서 소녀가 나타난 드래곤에게 구조되는 이야기를 담은 상세한 멀티샷 영화 프롬프트. VFX와 분위기 있는 사운드에 중점을 둡니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein detaillierter Multi-Shot-Kinoprompt über ein Mädchen in einem regnerischen Dorf, das von einem auftauchenden Drachen gerettet wird, mit Fokus auf VFX und atmosphärischem Sound.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt cinématographique détaillé multi-plans racontant l'histoire d'une fille dans un village pluvieux sauvée par un dragon émergent, avec un accent sur les VFX et l'ambiance sonore.
description_i18n.ru: Детальный многокадровый кинематографический промпт о девушке в дождливой деревне, спасённой появившимся драконом, с акцентом на VFX и атмосферное звуковое сопровождение.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt cinematográfico detallado de múltiples tomas sobre una niña en un pueblo lluvioso salvada por un dragón emergente, enfocado en VFX y sonido atmosférico.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt cinematográfico detalhado com múltiplas cenas sobre uma garota em uma vila chuvosa salva por um dragão emergente, focado em VFX e som atmosférico.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt cinematografico dettagliato multi-scena che racconta la storia di una ragazza in un villaggio piovoso salvata da un drago emergente, con focus su VFX e suono atmosferico.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt điện ảnh đa cảnh chi tiết về câu chuyện cô gái trong ngôi làng mưa được rồng xuất hiện cứu giúp, tập trung vào VFX và âm thanh không khí.
description_i18n.pl: Szczegółowy wieloujęciowy prompt kinematograficzny o dziewczynie w deszczowej wiosce uratowanej przez wyłaniającego się smoka, koncentrujący się na VFX i atmosferycznym dźwięku.
description_i18n.id: Prompt sinematik multi-shot terperinci tentang seorang gadis di desa hujan yang diselamatkan oleh naga yang muncul, berfokus pada VFX dan suara atmosferik.
description_i18n.nl: Een gedetailleerde meervoudige shot filmische prompt over een meisje in een regenachtig dorp dat gered wordt door een opkomende draak, met focus op VFX en atmosferisch geluid.
description_i18n.ar: موجه سينمائي متعدد اللقطات ومفصل حول فتاة في قرية ممطرة تم إنقاذها بواسطة تنين ناشئ، مع التركيز على VFX والصوت الجوي.
description_i18n.tr: Yağmurlu bir köyde ortaya çıkan bir ejderha tarafından kurtarılan bir kızın hikayesini anlatan detaylı çok çekimli sinematik prompt, VFX ve atmosferik ses odaklı.
description_i18n.uk: Детальний багатокадровий кінематографічний промпт про дівчину в дощовому селі, врятовану драконом, що з'явився, з акцентом на VFX та атмосферне звукове оформлення.
description_i18n.en: A detailed multi-shot cinematic prompt for a story about a girl in a rainy village saved by an emerging dragon, focusing on VFX and atmospheric sound.

query.en: Shot 1 (00:00–00:02) – WS, Rainy Night, Forward Tracking. A narrow, ancient village alley drenched in relentless rain. Water streams down slanted rooftops and floods uneven stone pathways, reflecting flickering lantern light. A young girl runs barefoot through the water, her soaked dress clinging to her as she struggles to keep balance. Behind her, shadowy figures move unnaturally—distorted, stretching and glitching with each lightning flash as they close in. VFX: Heavy rain simulation, reflective wet surfaces, lightning illuminating distorted shadows. SFX: Thunder cracks, rapid splashing footsteps, howling wind. Shot 2 (00:02–00:04) – CU, Panic Fall, Slight Handheld Shake. She suddenly slips and crashes onto the wet stone. Water splashes outward. Close on her face—rain mixes with tears, her breath sharp and uneven. Her trembling hands push against the ground as she tries to move back, eyes locked on the approaching darkness. VFX: Detailed splash simulation, motion blur, lens water droplets. SFX: Intensifying heartbeat, heavy breathing, rain striking surfaces. Shot 3 (00:04–00:06) – LS, Violent Ground Eruption. The ground beneath the shadows fractures violently. Stone explodes upward in a powerful shockwave, sending debris and water into the air. A massive dragon bursts from below—its body dark and armored, faint glowing veins pulsing beneath its scales. It rises between the girl and the shadows, instantly scattering them into fragments of darkness. VFX: Ground destruction, flying debris, glowing cracks, volumetric dust. SFX: Deep impact boom, layered dragon roar with sub-bass rumble. Shot 4 (00:06–00:08) – CU, Emotional Realization, Slow Push-In. The girl freezes, looking up. Her fear begins to fade. Lightning briefly illuminates the dragon’s face—its glowing eye calm, focused. The reflection of that eye fills hers. The rain appears to slow slightly in this moment. VFX: Eye reflection detail, subtle slow-motion rain, soft glow from dragon’s eye. SFX: Thunder fades into low ambient tone, rain softens. Shot 5 (00:08–00:11) – MS, Gentle Interaction, Static Frame. The dragon slowly lowers its massive head toward her, movements controlled and careful. It gently nudges her shoulder. Water droplets slide across its scales, glowing faintly as they fall. She hesitates, then slowly lifts her hand toward it, tension leaving her body. VFX: Subtle bioluminescent pulses under scales, detailed water interaction. SFX: Deep calm breathing, soft ambient hum. Shot 6 (00:11–00:13) – LS, Protective Wing Expansion. The dragon spreads its massive wings wide, forming a protective barrier around her. Rain violently hits the outer surface of the wings, but inside the space becomes still—dry, warm, and silent. The contrast between chaos outside and calm inside is immediate and striking. VFX: Rain deflection on wings, cold blue tones outside vs warm
